content:
Hello,

I notice that when "Liz" is equipped with "Fouetté" Wheels of Destiny , it triggers well when discarding at end of turn or using her exalt,
 and also when using "Encounter in pure white" posse, but not when using "Casiah" skill "Poof!"

Any clue about that ? 

From what I read and understood, "Poof!" skill discarding command cards should trigger "Fouetté" WoD .


Regards,

ookami
thread_title: ✅「Resolved」Fouetté WoD (Liz) and Poof! skill (Casiah) not working

content: «Poof!» doesn’t discard command cards. It’s shuffle your command cards into draw pile and draw them again from there. And «Poof!» only discard (put into discard pile) symptom and state cards.
thread_title: ✅「Resolved」Fouetté WoD (Liz) and Poof! skill (Casiah) not working

content:
Thanks for you answer : I was thinking shuffle imply you discard cards to your deck.

So any "shuffle" effect will not trigger discard effect ? So I should check discard keyword only
thread_title: ✅「Resolved」Fouetté WoD (Liz) and Poof! skill (Casiah) not working

content: it does activate the Aftershock effects, but only in Astral Realm\arc2 stages

content:
__**Phantasmal Dive**__

I think that this -20pts penalty per round played should be adjusted. 
And maybe implement it as 
Round 1-3 no deduction pts
4-6 deduction pts start appearing (20 or maybe even 10?) 
And then for each round 7+ more pts get deducted (20 or 30)

So that's way u can still keep that mechanic and idea u have behind it but I think it's really silly to have it set up from the start. Like everyone needs 1-2 rounds at least to prepare their cards, exalt etc (unless mobs/bosses r really weak ofc so ppl can one shot it)

Also I wish u didn't remove buffs choices in madness stage of Phantasmal dive. That was great for following growth imo. And beating higher and higher buffs each time. So I wish thats back too.
thread_title: Phantasmal Dive + Nerf

content:
__**Nerf in story mode**__

Please stop nerfing stages in story mode (50% more nerf u wanna implement is just insane). I understand that u wanna cater to new players but don't overdo it. Like this game/story is meant to be played for some time not to clear it all in few days. And then what? They won't have chars strong enough for arc2 nor for end game mode as D Tide. Imo bosses should have at least HP same as ch they r from so ch9 having around 10k+ per HP bar sounds more than fine for normal mode. 
People will be running out of content they can do (as they wont be prepared for end game) and it's also about their understanding of chars/team also bosses and how all mechanic works. If they can just put auto and easy clear all that way, they won't learn anything nor be prepared for arc2 or end game content. So it should have some balance and kinda prepare them for what comes next too. And it's game charm too. What's all that death resistance mechanic and revive for if can one shot all? And it's lit 1 of game selling points (besides unique artstyle and dark theme) and def what I see on any promo video too **challenging game** not **auto battler no brain game**

And I think what will help more actually is readjusting anniversary rewards (200 cores). Make last requirement instead being arc2 ch4 to be ch1 at least. Instead of nerfing constantly better do that imo.

-# I'm also saying this all as smn who have recent experience with all stages and all (as I'm not veteran but not totally new player either, around 3 months here and I'm still doing some of stages from arc1 for achievements). And people def should be able to get their rews in this 2 months time as long they know to organize well and take good use of revive and DR (if last requirement isn't arc2 ch4 as i already mentioned). 

So please reconsider all of this
thread_title: Phantasmal Dive + Nerf

content:
The eyeballs are currently at 30k hp each. So seemingly they'll go down to 15k...

Talking to some new players now, the main thing keeping a few of em stuck past chapter 7 is the grinding stages not giving enough Matts.

Again courtesy of B.I.A.V. holding an event only after a week of the patch drops.

It's hard to describe the game as easy now. From their perspective. They've been 2 trying bosses. Doing some team switching... But I do think dropping the eyeball hp bellow 30k for each is a bit much.

There's still the big want of the difficulty to exist. To encourage looking at their entire roster, to find a solution, and over time build towards it, just like I did like half a year ago.

This... More... Let's call it... Bingeable balancing has come with its own trouble of a lot of players having way too little of an understanding of the game and characters, they themselves play. Purely because of lack of challenge and stopping points earlier. Bluewil players using gnosis chapter 5. Thanks flares, such a good guidemaker.

Inevitably we live in a post hoyo world. Where players assume that every gacha will be just pulling the good characters and blasting through all story content. Not a solid well balanced experience like Morimens, where most character, wheel covenant investment finds a use.

Even if the side content and making every character usable acted as a band aid for the absurd difficulty spikes in the past. It worked as a damn good one for me and for many others.
thread_title: Phantasmal Dive + Nerf

content: There is really no balancing cheat, no theoretical perfection that will enable new players to look at this game as it really is, outside of their inate curiosity.
thread_title: Phantasmal Dive + Nerf
Phantasmal Dive + Nerf

content:
Lit why I started this game is cuz first:
* I loved how it looked
Dark theme style, Cthulhu mythos 
Both female and males char 
Char designs that r unique and all of them having depth to them + not just pretty face or gooner stuff. So glad that I don't see that here
Also pretty much even if tier list exist u still don't need to strictly follow it and make team that u like the most (for ex Ik that Tawil is considered 1 of best and I have her too but just don't like to use her personally)

* Then I liked cuz I actually needed to learn how to play it and use my brain to beat stages, go around bosses mechanics etc

So yeah def not against balancing stuff out but no need to make it too easy no brainer game either with too much nerf (and def if they ever introduce madness mode and I hope they will cuz it's lit there then they will need to balance all 3 modes again) 
Like lit if u r here for easy content, to let bot do all for u then just don't...find something else cuz there r too many games like that. And ik that they want more players (and I'm glad when see more ppl joining game too) but they should think about ppl who will actually stay and not some (cuz there will be def part of it) that is here just cuz all this rews etc (and cuz they just can't live without free stuff lol). 

And imo this devs r more than generous. I played too many games to count but here they respect and listen to players (smtms even too responsive like rn with nerfs imo) and give a lot of stuff too. So I really wish to see them and Mori succeed. Just don't want them losing their original charm really and become like everyone else.
